sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19930" key="biza/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βιζάριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n19930.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she-camel</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suckling camel, PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1821</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
